view.title: Validate explicit UC need #6
view.subtitle: Step failed: Exploratory validation failed: The requirement for guide assignment is not satisfied as evidenced by the current participant count.

blocks.title: Uc Need Validate 6 failed
blocks.message: Step failed: Exploratory validation failed: The requirement for guide assignment is not satisfied as evidenced by the current participant count.

items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation failed: The requirement for guide assignment is not satisfied as evidenced by the current participant count.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for 'Guide assignment' within the context of the tour. However, the evidence indicates that only 3 participants are currently booked, which does not meet the minimum requirement of 4 participants needed to run the tour. This gap in participant count directly impacts the ability to assign a guide, confirming that the requirement for guide assignment is not satisfied. The gaps identified in prior validations regarding participant counts further support this conclusion.
